summary: Summary: Speaker2 starts the conversation with frustration about the application process, then rips open a large packet and, excited, announces acceptance to USC. Speaker1 responds with surprise and excited congratulations and expresses happiness about visiting Los Angeles. They discuss Speaker2’s plans—moving to Los Angeles, majoring in communications, and playing on a strong football team—with both speakers excited and expressing happiness as they imagine exploring campus, hanging out, and joining the student community. Overall, Speaker2’s emotional arc moves from frustration to excited and happiness upon acceptance, while Speaker1 remains excited and expresses happiness throughout, reacting with surprise to the news.
